<path>/home/himmel/personal/prsui/registry/new-york/text-highlight.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: "use client"
2: 
3: import {
4:   ElementType,
5:   forwardRef,
6:   useEffect,
7:   useImperativeHandle,
8:   useMemo,
9:   useRef,
10:   useState,
11: } from "react"
12: import { motion, Transition, useInView, UseInViewOptions } from "motion/react"
13: 
14: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
15: 
16: type HighlightDirection = "ltr" | "rtl" | "ttb" | "btt"
17: 
18: type TextHighlighterProps = {
19:   children: React.ReactNode // The text content to be highlighted
20:   as?: ElementType // HTML element to render as (default: "p")
21:   triggerType?: "hover" | "ref" | "inView" | "auto" //How to trigger the animation (default: "inView")
22:   transition?: Transition // Animation transition configuration (default: { duration: 0.4, type: "spring", bounce: 0 })
23:   useInViewOptions?: UseInViewOptions // Options for useInView hook when triggerType is "inView"
24:   className?: string // Class name for the container element
25:   highlightColor?: string
26:   // Highlight color (CSS color string). Also can be a function that returns a color string, eg: 'hsl(60, 90%, 68%)' (yellow)
27:   direction?: HighlightDirection // Direction of the highlight animation (default: "ltr" (left to right))
28: } & React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
29: 
30: export type TextHighlighterRef = {
31:   animate: (direction?: HighlightDirection) => void // Trigger the highlight animation
32:   reset: () => void // Reset the highlight animation
33: }
34: 
35: export const TextHighlighter = forwardRef<
36:   TextHighlighterRef,
37:   TextHighlighterProps
38: >(
39:   (
40:     {
41:       children,
42:       as = "span",
43:       triggerType = "inView",
44:       transition = { type: "spring", duration: 1, delay: 0, bounce: 0 },
45:       useInViewOptions = {
46:         once: true,
47:         initial: false,
48:         amount: 0.1,
49:       },
50:       className,
51:       highlightColor = "hsl(25, 90%, 80%)",
52:       direction = "ltr",
53:       ...props
54:     },
55:     ref
56:   ) => {
57:     const componentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
58:     const [isAnimating, setIsAnimating] = useState(false)
59:     const [isHovered, setIsHovered] = useState(false)
60:     const [currentDirection, setCurrentDirection] =
61:       useState<HighlightDirection>(direction)
62: 
63:     // this allows us to change the direction whenever the direction prop changes
64:     useEffect(() => {
65:       setCurrentDirection(direction)
66:     }, [direction])
67: 
68:     const isInView =
69:       triggerType === "inView"
70:         ? useInView(componentRef, useInViewOptions)
71:         : false
72: 
73:     useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
74:       animate: (animationDirection?: HighlightDirection) => {
75:         if (animationDirection) {
76:           setCurrentDirection(animationDirection)
77:         }
78:         setIsAnimating(true)
79:       },
80:       reset: () => setIsAnimating(false),
81:     }))
82: 
83:     const shouldAnimate =
84:       triggerType === "hover"
85:         ? isHovered
86:         : triggerType === "inView"
87:           ? isInView
88:           : triggerType === "ref"
89:             ? isAnimating
90:             : triggerType === "auto"
91:               ? true
92:               : false
93: 
94:     const ElementTag = as || "span"
95: 
96:     // Get background size based on direction
97:     const getBackgroundSize = (animated: boolean) => {
98:       switch (currentDirection) {
99:         case "ltr":
100:           return animated ? "100% 100%" : "0% 100%"
101:         case "rtl":
102:           return animated ? "100% 100%" : "0% 100%"
103:         case "ttb":
104:           return animated ? "100% 100%" : "100% 0%"
105:         case "btt":
106:           return animated ? "100% 100%" : "100% 0%"
107:         default:
108:           return animated ? "100% 100%" : "0% 100%"
109:       }
110:     }
111: 
112:     // Get background position based on direction
113:     const getBackgroundPosition = () => {
114:       switch (currentDirection) {
115:         case "ltr":
116:           return "0% 0%"
117:         case "rtl":
118:           return "100% 0%"
119:         case "ttb":
120:           return "0% 0%"
121:         case "btt":
122:           return "0% 100%"
123:         default:
124:           return "0% 0%"
125:       }
126:     }
127: 
128:     const animatedSize = useMemo(() => getBackgroundSize(shouldAnimate), [shouldAnimate, currentDirection])
129:     const initialSize = useMemo(() => getBackgroundSize(false), [currentDirection])
130:     const backgroundPosition = useMemo(() => getBackgroundPosition(), [currentDirection])
131: 
132:     const highlightStyle = {
133:       backgroundImage: `linear-gradient(${highlightColor}, ${highlightColor})`,
134:       backgroundRepeat: "no-repeat",
135:       backgroundPosition: backgroundPosition,
136:       backgroundSize: animatedSize,
137:       boxDecorationBreak: "clone",
138:       WebkitBoxDecorationBreak: "clone",
139:     } as React.CSSProperties
140: 
141:     return (
142:       <ElementTag
143:         ref={componentRef}
144:         onMouseEnter={() => triggerType === "hover" && setIsHovered(true)}
145:         onMouseLeave={() => triggerType === "hover" && setIsHovered(false)}
146:         {...props}
147:       >
148:         <motion.span
149:           className={cn("inline", className)}
150:           style={highlightStyle}
151:           animate={{
152:             backgroundSize: animatedSize,
153:           }}
154:           initial={{
155:             backgroundSize: initialSize,
156:           }}
157:           transition={transition}
158:         >
159:           {children}
160:         </motion.span>
161:       </ElementTag>
162:     )
163:   }
164: )
165: 
166: TextHighlighter.displayName = "TextHighlighter"
167: 
168: export default TextHighlighter

(End of file - total 168 lines)
</content>

<content>
1: ---
2: title: GitHub Stars
3: description: Animated GitHub star count button with hover effects and spring physics.
4: ---
5: 
6: import { GitHubStarsDemo } from "@/demo/github-stars-demo";
7: 
8: <ComponentPreview name="github-stars">
9:   <GitHubStarsDemo />
10: </ComponentPreview>
11: 
12: ## Installation
13: 
14: If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:
15: 
16: <CodeBlockCommand
17:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/github-stars"

input.content:
---
title: Text Highlight
description: Animated text highlight with customizable direction, color, and trigger types.
---

import { TextHighlightDemo } from "@/demo/text-highlight-demo";

<ComponentPreview name="text-highlight">
  <TextHighlightDemo />
</ComponentPreview>

## Installation

If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
/>

Otherwise, use the full registry URL:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
/>

## Usage

After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:

```tsx
"use client";

import { TextHighlighter } from "@/components/prsui/text-highlight";

export function MyComponent() {
  return (
    <TextHighlighter
      as="p"
      className="text-4xl font-medium"
      highlightColor="hsl(25, 90%, 80%)"
      direction="ltr"
    >
      Highlighted text
    </TextHighlighter>
  );
}
```

## Props

| Prop              | Type                                          | Default                      | Description                                             |
| ----------------- | --------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| `children`        | `React.ReactNode`                             | -                            | The text content to be highlighted.                     |
| `as`              | `ElementType`                                 | `"span"`                     | HTML element to render as.                              |
| `triggerType`     | `"hover" \| "ref" \| "inView" \| "auto"`      | `"inView"`                   | How to trigger the animation.                           |
| `transition`      | `Transition`                                  | `{ type: "spring", ... }`    | Animation transition configuration.                     |
| `useInViewOptions`| `UseInViewOptions`                            | `{ once: true, ... }`        | Options for useInView hook when triggerType is "inView".|
| `className`       | `string`                                      | -                            | Class name for the container element.                   |
| `highlightColor`  | `string`                                      | `"hsl(25, 90%, 80%)"`        | Highlight color (CSS color string).                     |
| `direction`       | `"ltr" \| "rtl" \| "ttb" \| "btt"`           | `"ltr"`                      | Direction of the highlight animation.                   |

## Ref Methods

The component exposes a ref with the following methods:

| Method                       | Description                              |
| ---------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| `animate(direction?)`       | Trigger the highlight animation.         |
| `reset()`                   | Reset the highlight animation.           |
